title: dryopteris submontana
intro: Dryopteris submontana is a species of fern native to the mountainous regions of China. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve liver function. The health benefits of this plant include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which may help to protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. Dryopteris submontana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
